title: Black Spyglass
description: Changes the spyglass to a soul-tracing demon!!
body:
## The Void Lens: Shadow Spyglass

Observe the world through the eyes of the void. This pack transforms the standard copper spyglass into the **Void Lens**—a sleek, darkened instrument forged for the silent observer.

![Showcase third person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b1a4fa7bbfa4f4d9b89c9da1278e93a67faf6f6_0.webp)

---

### Pack Features
* **Onyx Finish:** The metallic copper and gold accents are replaced with deep charcoal and matte-black textures.
* **Anti-Reflective Coating:** A darker, more "stealth-focused" look that matches the Soulless Totem aesthetic.
* **Void-Tinted Glass:** The lens itself features a subtle, darkened hue to reduce glare during your scouting missions.

---

### The Lore: The Gaze of Null
While tracking his enemies from the far reaches of the End, **Null** required a tool that wouldn't catch the light and reveal his position. He took a standard spyglass and submerged it in the same liquid void used for the Shadow Arrows. 

The copper was instantly neutralized, turning into a non-reflective, pitch-black material. It is rumored that looking through this lens allows you to see things as Null does—cold, calculated, and inevitable.
